name: Maple Peach Sundaes
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Peach, peeled, pitted and cut-up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium nonstick skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the peach to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until it becomes tender.
3. Stir in the maple syrup and let the mixture cool for 10 minutes.
4. To serve, spoon the peach mixture over the frozen yogurt.
5. Sprinkle with chopped pecans.
6. Serves 2
